mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, COUNT(p.id) AS productCount FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, COUNT(p.id) AS productCount FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name
